holdings.infoBox: XA is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palo Alto Networks stock at 12.66%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 10.83%, Datadog at 6.73%, Fortinet at 6.47%, and Okta, Inc. at 5.61%.

overview.description: The Corgi AI Cybersecurity ETF (XA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme.  The fund actively selects companies across the global AI-driven cybersecurity sector. It seeks capital appreciation and combines fundamental analysis, thematic screening, and quantitative methods in selecting securities. XA was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
